name: Arke

skills.name: Kiss of Death
skills.description: Attacks launched from the front of the target will not crit, but backstabs are guaranteed to crit.

skills.name: Arclight
skills.description: Attacks twice in a row, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Untouchable
skills.description: Dashes forward and attacks, marking an enemy while dealing physical damage and gaining Attack Speed. Attacking marked targets slows them and reduces this skill's cooldown. She takes less damage from marked targets.

skills.name: Phantom Dance
skills.description: Enters stealth, gaining a Movement Speed boost and Health recovery. She enhances her attacks after exiting stealth, gains extra Movement Speed upon dealing damage, and refreshes all skill cooldowns with defeats and assists.

skillsZh.name: 死吻
skillsZh.description: 阿軻正面攻擊無法暴擊，背刺必定暴擊。

skillsZh.name: 弧光
skillsZh.description: 阿軻連續攻擊兩次，造成物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 瞬華
skillsZh.description: 阿軻向前位移後，攻擊並標記一名敵人，造成物理傷害，提升自身攻速，攻擊標記目標會額外造成減速並減少此技能冷卻，同時減少受到標記目標的傷害。

skillsZh.name: 幻舞
skillsZh.description: 阿軻進入隱身狀態，獲得加速和回復，解除隱身後強化攻擊力，造成傷害時額外獲得加速，參與擊殺會重置所有技能冷卻。

tips: Build: Master Sword, Rapacious Bite, Shadow Ripper.
tipsZh: 阿軻（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 51.37%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、貪婪之噬、影刃.

faqs.question: Is Arke good in current season?
faqs.answer: Arke is Tier A Assassin with 51.37% win rate, 0.54% pick rate, and 0.61% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Arke build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Rapacious Bite, Shadow Ripper, Overlord's Might, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Arke?
faqs.answer: Pick Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan. Strong into Alessio, Da Qiao.

faqsZh.question: 阿軻 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 阿軻 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.37%、選取 0.54%、禁用 0.61%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 阿軻 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、貪婪之噬、影刃、強者破軍、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 阿軻？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Bai Qi、Arthur、Cai Yan。阿軻 克制 Alessio、Da Qiao。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Alessio, Da Qiao. Weak into: Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Alessio、Da Qiao；被克制：Bai Qi、Arthur、Cai Yan

guide.overview: Arke is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 52.4% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Arke: Attacks launched from the front of the target will not crit, but backstabs are guaranteed to crit.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Eternity Blade, Master Sword, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Arke's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Arclight → Untouchable → Phantom Dance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Phantom Dance (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Untouchable provides mobility or stick—max first. Arclight second for damage. Phantom Dance on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Arclight → Untouchable → Phantom Dance → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Phantom Dance after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Arke is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.8% — expect Arke to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Arke vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Arke has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Arke vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Arke has +1.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Arke excels into Alessio, Da Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan without team peel.
